headline: CMA 1998 Amendment Expands MCMC Takedown Powers
context: Parliament passed CMA amendments granting MCMC authority to order content removal within 24 hours without court order.

cards.big: CMA amendment lets MCMC remove content in 24 hours without court order
cards.sub: Critics say expanded powers could silence legitimate criticism and press freedom

cards.big: MCMC issued 4,800 content removal orders in 2025 up 65% from 2023
cards.sub: Only 12% of removal orders went through judicial review before enforcement

cards.big: Amendment imposes RM500,000 fine on platforms failing to comply in 24 hours
cards.sub: Social media companies warned timeline is technically impossible for review

cards.big: CIJ documented 85 cases of legitimate content wrongly removed in 2025
cards.sub: Satire political commentary and whistleblower posts among incorrectly flagged

cards.big: Takedown powers test whether content regulation serves public safety or silences dissent
Expanded MCMC takedown powers need judicial checks. Content regulation without due process becomes censorship.
